header.title: Feats of the Tarnished
header.description: A curated collection of legendary conquests, technical experimentations forged in the crucible of the Lands Between, and open source offerings laid at the foot of the Erdtree. Filterable by decree, sigils, and sacred armaments.
filter.none_tag: No sigils discovered in this realm.
filter.none_stack: No armaments found in this dungeon.
omnicard.shortDescription: A strategic card game of immense ambition — a custom business engine forged with the precision of Hewg's hammer, modular as the Elden Ring itself.
omnicard.longDescription: Omnicard is a Great Rune among projects: a complete strategic card game with a business engine complex enough to rival the Elden Ring's own structure. Domain modeling, effect management, real-time synchronization — each a demigod to be conquered. The Tarnished labors still, for this is a legacy dungeon of the highest order.
omnicard.highlights.0: Design of a modular, rules-oriented engine worthy of the Golden Order
omnicard.highlights.1: Management of effects, events and game states more complex than Radahn's festival
omnicard.highlights.2: Real-time jolly cooperation between players across the fog
omnicard.lessonsLearned.0: Structuring business logic without going hollow
omnicard.lessonsLearned.1: Evolving a game engine like leveling a build — clean and testable
omnicard.lessonsLearned.2: Architecting a legacy dungeon that mixes front, back, and gameplay
pvzf-translation-fr.shortDescription: Leading the French legion of the PVZ Fusion translation — a Tarnished commanding their own summons.
pvzf-translation-fr.longDescription: PVZF Translation FR is the French campaign of the PVZ Fusion translation crusade. The Tarnished leads this host with coordination worthy of Radahn himself, maintaining terminological consistency like maintaining poise in a boss fight. It is not mere translation — it is a siege.
pvzf-translation-fr.highlights.0: Commander of the French Tarnished host
pvzf-translation-fr.highlights.1: Terminological poise — never staggered by inconsistency
pvzf-translation-fr.highlights.2: Coordination worthy of Radahn's Festival of War
pvzf-translation-fr.lessonsLearned.0: Commanding a cooperative invasion with quality requirements
pvzf-translation-fr.lessonsLearned.1: Formalizing the laws of translation like the Golden Order
pvzf-translation-fr.lessonsLearned.2: Maintaining Grace in a chaotic, evolving battlefield
portfolio.shortDescription: A next-generation portfolio forged as an immersive experience — personal branding worthy of an Elden Lord, with animations that would make Radagon envious.
portfolio.longDescription: This portfolio is no mere showcase — it is a complete demonstration of the Tarnished's mastery, a living monument to modern front-end arts. The goal: an immersive, polished experience reflecting technical prowess, product vision, and the attention to detail of one who has read every item description in the game.
portfolio.highlights.0: Modern Angular architecture with SSR and hydration — like kindling a Site of Grace
portfolio.highlights.1: System of reusable components, strongly-typed as Hewg's finest weapons
portfolio.highlights.2: GSAP animations that flow like Malenia's Waterfowl Dance
portfolio.highlights.3: Lighthouse optimization — chasing performance like chasing the Elden Ring itself
portfolio.highlights.4: Custom design system with the visual gravitas of Leyndell, Royal Capital
portfolio.lessonsLearned.0: Building architecture for a heavily animated site (harder than Malenia, tbh)
portfolio.lessonsLearned.1: Balancing rich animations with mobile performance — a boss fight in itself
portfolio.lessonsLearned.2: Using UX as a vector for technical branding, like using lore for worldbuilding
portfolio.lessonsLearned.3: Industrializing responsive media management — a quest with no fast travel
lis-web.shortDescription: A professional web presence forged in the real world — no illusions, no phantoms, just delivery.
lis-web.longDescription: LIS Web is a concrete siege — a real, usable web solution. This conquest tests the Tarnished against the true final boss: aligning business expectations with technical delivery while maintaining the credibility of one who has actually beaten the game.
lis-web.highlights.0: A web presence as credible as a +25 weapon
lis-web.highlights.1: Business expectations and technical delivery in perfect jolly cooperation
lis-web.highlights.2: A project grounded in the real Lands Between of professional work
lis-web.lessonsLearned.0: Translating client demands into a clear interface (like reading cryptic item descriptions)
lis-web.lessonsLearned.1: Building a web presence with genuine credibility — no summons allowed
lis-web.lessonsLearned.2: Converging technique, image and readability like converging Great Runes
dev-mates.shortDescription: The company's showcase — a banner raised in the Lands Between of professional identity.
dev-mates.longDescription: Dev-Mates is the banner of the Tarnished's company. Part communication sigil, part technical conquest — it represents professional presence, clear identity, and a service offering that shines like the Erdtree on the horizon.
dev-mates.highlights.0: Showcasing a professional activity like raising a banner at a Site of Grace
dev-mates.highlights.1: Message, image, and structure aligned like the stars of Radahn's constellation
dev-mates.highlights.2: A project centered on the credibility of the Golden Order
dev-mates.lessonsLearned.0: Building a site that serves both communication and conquest
dev-mates.lessonsLearned.1: Thinking about company identity through the lens of the Erdtree
dev-mates.lessonsLearned.2: Image-driven approach without sacrificing the rigor of the Golden Order
pvz-fuzion-console-manager.shortDescript: A console armament that detects missing translations — the Tarnished's quality assurance blade.
pvz-fuzion-console-manager.longDescripti: PVZ Fuzion Console Manager is a weapon forged for a specific purpose: detecting missing translations on a given version. Like a spirit ash summoned for a precise encounter, it simplifies quality control and ensures no string is left behind in the fog.
pvz-fuzion-console-manager.highlights.0: Automated detection of missing translations — no hidden walls remain
pvz-fuzion-console-manager.highlights.1: Quality assurance worthy of the Roundtable Hold's standards
pvz-fuzion-console-manager.highlights.2: Concrete utility forged from the real needs of the Tarnished fellowship
pvz-fuzion-console-manager.lessonsLearne: Creating tools that are genuinely useful (like the crafting kit, but actually good)
Automating the tedious so the Tarnished can focus on greater conquests
Designing from a concrete need — not from the ramblings of the Two Fingers
shreksophone.shortDescription: A troll artifact — a mini-CDN that surrenders the entire user experience to a full-screen Shrek saxophone solo.
shreksophone.longDescription: Shreksophone is the Patches of projects: deliberately absurd, technically simple, fully committed to betrayal. One click and the entire interface bows before the Ogre Lord, making way for a full-screen saxophone solo. It is the Elden Ring's equivalent of an invader who only uses gestures.
shreksophone.highlights.0: A concept as immediately recognizable as the Erdtree on the skyline
shreksophone.highlights.1: Simple but effective execution — like a backstab with a dagger
shreksophone.highlights.2: Creative direction more committed than Patches to being a coward
shreksophone.lessonsLearned.0: Seeing a concept through even when it is deliberately maidenless
shreksophone.lessonsLearned.1: Creating a legendary project with minimal rune investment
shreksophone.lessonsLearned.2: Working on tone and impact — the PvP emote of web development
glossairequest.shortDescription: An educational quest forged with Angular and ASP.NET Core — knowledge through trial.
glossairequest.longDescription: GlossaireQuest is a web application as structured as a legacy dungeon: Angular on the front, ASP.NET Core in the depths. Users face interactive quizzes — each a boss encounter testing their knowledge. Statistics, result tracking, and admin management complete this grand cathedral of learning.
glossairequest.highlights.0: JWT authentication — sealed tighter than a fog gate
glossairequest.highlights.1: Quiz, score and user stats — the Rune Level system of education
glossairequest.highlights.2: Front/back architecture as clean as Leyndell's golden streets
glossairequest.lessonsLearned.0: Separation of concerns between Angular and .NET — like separating the Elden Ring's Great Runes
glossairequest.lessonsLearned.1: Structuring protected routes like sealing Shardbearers behind fog gates
glossairequest.lessonsLearned.2: Designing an educational dungeon with business logic and tracking
league-of-data-base.shortDescription: A web application centralizing League of Legends data — the Roundtable Hold of champion information.
league-of-data-base.longDescription: League of Data Base is a fortress built to centralize, store and display League of Legends data. Designed as an extensible stronghold, it manages champions, items, runes and other resources with multilingual and multi-version support — a true Roundtable Hold of gaming data.
league-of-data-base.highlights.0: Riot API integration — like communing with the Two Fingers but actually useful
league-of-data-base.highlights.1: Storage optimization with hard links — hoarding resources like a proper Tarnished
league-of-data-base.highlights.2: Responsive interface as polished as the Erdtree's golden bark
league-of-data-base.lessonsLearned.0: Designing extensible architecture around an ever-patching API (the Shattering of versions)
league-of-data-base.lessonsLearned.1: Optimizing storage of a vast media hoard — the Tarnished's inventory management
league-of-data-base.lessonsLearned.2: Managing user preferences across sessions — maintaining Grace between play sessions
blender-collection.shortDescription: A web platform for managing Blender add-on collections — the Hewg's smithy of 3D tools.
blender-collection.longDescription: Blender Collection is a stronghold for organizing and sharing Blender add-ons. Users forge their own collections, choose public or private visibility, then download their extensions as a single bundle — like collecting all Great Runes into one Elden Ring.
blender-collection.highlights.0: Profile and collection management — public and private like invaded vs. peaceful worlds
blender-collection.highlights.1: Admin dashboard with analytics — the Grace Map of supervision
blender-collection.highlights.2: Async workers and cache — summon spirits that work while you explore
blender-collection.lessonsLearned.0: Structuring a community stronghold with role levels (Tarnished, Knight, Elden Lord)
blender-collection.lessonsLearned.1: Heavy operations without blocking — like Radahn holding back the stars without stopping the festival
blender-collection.lessonsLearned.2: Deploying with Docker and GitHub Actions — fast travel for code
symfony-session.shortDescription: A Symfony fortress focused on session management, security and administration — the Golden Order of web apps.
symfony-session.longDescription: SymfonySession is a web application built as a bastion of session management, security, and administration. A foundation for back-office tools or training platforms — as solid as Leyndell's walls before the Shattering.
symfony-session.highlights.0: Google Captcha, honeypot, and rate limiter — defenses worthy of the Capital
symfony-session.highlights.1: Full CRUD — managing entities like a true Elden Lord manages their domain
symfony-session.highlights.2: PDF generation and FullCalendar — mapping the Lands Between of schedules
symfony-session.lessonsLearned.0: Hardening a Symfony app with multiple security layers — like fortifying Leyndell
symfony-session.lessonsLearned.1: Structuring clean MVC — the Golden Order demands it
symfony-session.lessonsLearned.2: Articulating front-end ergonomics with server logic — a Radagon/Marika duality
